name: Site Kit by Google < 1.8.0 - WordPress Plugin Vulnerabilities - WPScan
snippet:
This flaw allows any authenticated user, regardless of capability, to become a Google Search Console owner for any site running the Site Kit by Google plugin.
See details on Site Kit by Google < 1.8.0 - Privilege Escalation to gain Search Console Access CVE 2020-8934. View the latest Plugin Vulnerabilities on WPScan.

name: Version 1.168.0: Use Cool Site Kits with Enhanced Security
snippet: “Site Kit by Google” plugin, version 1.168.0, has successfully passed the Plugin Security Certification (PSC) from CleanTalk.
